landing.title: Get Started
landing.subtitle: Create a new Oxy identity or import an existing one
landing.importIdentitySubtitle: Use your recovery phrase or backup file

usernameRequired.title: Username Required
usernameRequired.subtitle: You need to set a username before you can sync your identity
usernameRequired.hint: You can use a-z, 0-9. Minimum length is 4 characters.
usernameRequired.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid username (4+ characters, a-z and 0-9 only)
usernameRequired.errorFormat: You can use a-z, 0-9. Minimum length is 4 characters.

recoveryPhrase.title: Save your recovery phrase
recoveryPhrase.subtitle: These 12 words are the ONLY way to restore your account if you lose this device. Write them down in order and keep them somewhere safe and offline.
recoveryPhrase.warningTitle: This is your only chance to save it
recoveryPhrase.warning: Oxy cannot recover your account for you. If you lose both this device and this phrase, your account is gone forever.
recoveryPhrase.copyWarning: Do not screenshot or store this phrase digitally. Write it down on paper.
recoveryPhrase.confirmCheckbox: I have written down my recovery phrase and stored it in a safe place. I understand Oxy cannot recover it for me.
recoveryPhrase.missingMessage: We could not show your recovery phrase. Please go back and create your identity again.
recoveryPhrase.backNavigationBlockedMessage: You must save your recovery phrase before continuing. If you leave now, you will lose access to your account.

identityExists.title: Identity already exists
identityExists.message: An Oxy identity already exists on this device. Continue with the existing identity or, if you have your previous recovery phrase saved, you can replace it.
identityExists.replaceWarning: This will permanently remove the existing identity from this device. Make sure you have its recovery phrase saved first.

usernameStep.title: Choose your username
usernameStep.subtitleOffline: You're offline. You can set your username later when online.
usernameStep.subtitle: Your username is required. You can change this later in settings.
usernameStep.hint: You can use a-z, 0-9. Minimum length is 4 characters.

importStep.title: Import Your Identity
importStep.subtitle: Enter your 12-word recovery phrase to restore your identity.

recommendations.recoveryEmailSubtitle: Help secure your account and enable account recovery
recommendations.recoveryEmailAlertMessage: A recovery email helps you regain access to your account if you lose your keys. Would you like to add one now?
recommendations.recoveryEmailGoToProfile: Please go to your Profile settings to add an email address.
recommendations.oldSessionsSubtitle: Some sessions haven't been used in over 30 days
recommendations.manyDevicesSubtitle: Review your active devices to ensure they're all yours
recommendations.suspiciousAlertMessage: You have {{count}} critical security event(s). Please review your security activity below and consider changing your password or signing out of all devices if you notice any suspicious activity.
recommendations.recoveryPhraseBackupSubtitle: If you lose this device and have no backup, your account cannot be recovered. Create an encrypted backup now.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanently and irreversibly delete your Oxy account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.permanentBody: Deleting your account will permanently remove your profile, identity, email mailboxes, attachments, and all data linked to {{name}}. We cannot restore deleted accounts.

items.profile: Your Oxy profile and public identity
items.mailboxes: All email mailboxes, messages, and attachments

deleteAccount.identityRequiredMessage: Account deletion requires the device that holds your identity key. Please sign in on the device you used to create this identity.
deleteAccount.failedDefault: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
deleteAccount.localKeyPurgeWarning: Your account was deleted, but the identity key could not be removed from this device. Reinstall the app to clear it fully.
deleteAccount.signInRequired: Please sign in to delete your account.
deleteAccount.confirmInputLabel: Type your username to confirm account deletion

payments.title: Payments & subscriptions
payments.subtitle: Manage your payment methods, subscriptions, and wallets.

wallet.subtitle: Your in-app wallet for Oxy services
wallet.oxyPaySubtitle: Balance: {{balance}} — Pay for subscriptions, services, and features
wallet.fairwalletSubtitle: Direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning

methods.cardEmpty: Secure card payments — No card on file
methods.oxyPaySubtitle: Balance: {{balance}} — Use your in-app wallet balance
methods.fairwalletSubtitle: Pay with FairCoin via QR code

expanded.cardBody: Secure card payments processed through Oxy services. Your card details are encrypted and handled by secure payment processors. Cards are charged when purchasing subscriptions or services.
expanded.oxyPayBody: Your in-app wallet uses FairCoin as the base currency. Use your balance to pay for subscriptions, premium features, and services within the Oxy ecosystem. Your current balance is displayed at the top of this screen.
expanded.fairwalletBody: FAIRWallet enables direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning. When making a payment, choose FAIRWallet as your payment method and scan the generated QR code with your FairCoin wallet app. Transactions use blockchain technology for transparency and security.

history.noBillingSubtitle: Your payments and invoices will appear here
history.noTransactionsSubtitle: Your wallet transactions will appear here

info.fairCoinBody: FairCoin is the base cryptocurrency used across all Oxy services. All transactions, including subscriptions, services, and in-app purchases, are denominated in FairCoin.
info.oxyPayBody: Oxy Pay is your in-app wallet that stores your FairCoin balance. Use it to pay for subscriptions, premium features, and services within the Oxy ecosystem. Your balance is displayed at the top of this screen.
info.fairwalletBody: FAIRWallet enables direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning. When making a payment, you can choose FAIRWallet as your payment method and scan the generated QR code with your FairCoin wallet app.
info.securityBody: All payments are processed securely through Oxy services. Your payment information is encrypted and never stored on your device. Credit card details are handled by secure payment processors, and cryptocurrency transactions use blockchain technology for transparency and security.
info.paymentMethodsBody: You can pay using Credit/Debit Cards, Oxy Pay wallet balance, or FAIRWallet. When purchasing subscriptions or services, the payment gateway will guide you through the process and allow you to choose your preferred payment method.

fairCoinBanner.title: FairCoin Wallet
fairCoinBanner.description: A self-custody cryptocurrency wallet for managing your FairCoin. You control your keys and funds independently from Oxy services.
fairCoinBanner.openMessage: Please visit https://fairco.in/wallet to learn more about FAIRWallet.

search.startSubtitle: Type in the search bar above to find screens and navigate to different sections of your account.

head.title: Commons by Oxy
head.description: Your Oxy identity vault — create and hold your keys on your device.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or restart the app.

a11y.logoHint: Tap to go home, double tap to scroll to top
a11y.openStoreHint: Opens the app store to install the FairCoin wallet

scanQr.identityRequiredBody:
To scan QR codes and authorize sign-in requests, you need to create or import an identity.

Identity creation is only available on native platforms (iOS/Android). Please use the mobile app to set up your identity.
scanQr.permissionBody: To scan QR codes for sign-in authorization, we need access to your camera.
scanQr.instructions: Scan the QR code shown in the app you want to sign in to
scanQr.invalidBody: This QR code is not a valid Oxy authorization request.

authorize.permissionsTitle: This app will be able to:
authorize.authorizedSuccess: Authorized {{app}} to access your Oxy identity.

errors.alreadyProcessed: This authorization request has already been processed or expired
errors.noSession: No active session. Please sign in first.

aboutIdentity.title: About Your Identity
aboutIdentity.subtitle: Self-custody identity powered by cryptography
aboutIdentity.importantNotice: Your recovery phrase is the ONLY way to restore your identity if you lose access to this device. Oxy cannot reset or recover your account. Keep your recovery phrase safe and never share it.
aboutIdentity.selfCustodyDescription: Unlike traditional accounts, your Oxy identity uses the same technology that secures Bitcoin. You have complete control over your identity.

items.privateKeySubtitle: Your private key is encrypted and stored securely on this device. It never leaves your device.
items.noPasswordSubtitle: You sign in using cryptographic proof, not passwords that can be guessed or stolen.
items.recoverySubtitle: Your 12-word recovery phrase is the only way to restore your identity on a new device.
items.decentralizedSubtitle: Your identity is not controlled by any company. You own it completely.

aboutIdentity.exportKeySubtitle: Print your private key for secure backup
aboutIdentity.accountSettingsDescription: Manage your account preferences and expiration settings.

expirationPicker.title: Account Expiration
expirationPicker.message: Choose when your account expires after inactivity

aboutIdentity.expirationUpdateFailed: Failed to update account expiration setting. Please try again.

securityWarning.title: Security Warning
securityWarning.message:
Exporting your private key will print it on paper. Anyone with access to this printed key can control your identity. Make sure you are in a secure location and will store the printed document safely.

Do you want to continue?

export.noPrivateKey: No private key found on this device
export.sentToPrinter: Private key has been sent to printer
export.failed: Failed to export private key. Please try again.

print.warningBody: This document contains your private key. Anyone with access to this key can control your identity. Store this document in a secure location, such as a safe or safety deposit box. Never share this key with anyone.
print.info1: This private key is used to sign transactions and prove your identity
print.info2: If you lose this key and your recovery phrase, you will permanently lose access to your identity
print.info3: Do not store this document digitally (screenshots, cloud storage, etc.)
print.info4: Consider storing multiple copies in different secure locations
print.info5: If this key is compromised, you should immediately create a new identity
print.footerLine2: This document was generated by the Oxy Accounts app

backup.missingSubtitle: We could not find a private key on this device. Backups encrypt the identity key stored locally, so you need to create or import your identity first.
backup.missingBanner: If you already have an identity on another device, sign in there and create the backup from that device.
backup.title: Create Encrypted Backup
backup.subtitle: Generate a password-protected backup file that you can store securely offline.
backup.banner: Store this file in a secure location (safe, encrypted drive, etc.). Never share your password or backup file.
backup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters long
errors.noPrivateKey: No private key found on this device
errors.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this platform

backup.shareSuccess: Backup file ready. Save it to a secure location like your password manager, encrypted drive, or offline storage.

readme.title: Oxy Identity Backup
readme.intro: This backup file contains your encrypted identity.
readme.restoreStep2: Use the Oxy Accounts app to import the wallet.json file
readme.restoreStep3: Enter your backup password when prompted
readme.important1: Store this file in a secure location (safe, encrypted drive, etc.)
readme.important2: Never share your password or backup file
readme.important3: Keep multiple copies in different secure locations
readme.important4: If this backup is compromised, create a new identity immediately

home.title: Your identity
home.subtitle: The keys to your Oxy identity live on this device.
home.yourIdentitySubtitle: You hold the private key. No one can lock you out.
home.accountSubtitle: Manage your profile, devices and privacy in the Accounts app.

actions.aboutIdentitySubtitle: Public key, self-custody details and export
actions.createBackupSubtitle: Save a recoverable copy of your keys

scan.title: Sign in to another device
scan.subtitle: Point your camera at the QR code shown on the other device or website.
scan.instructions: Scan the QR code to approve sign-in
scan.invalidBody: That QR code isn't a valid Oxy sign-in request.
scan.expiredBody: This sign-in request has expired. Ask for a new QR code.
scan.permissionBody: Allow camera access to scan sign-in QR codes.

approve.heading: Sign-in request
approve.scopesTitle: This app will be able to access
approve.approvedBody: You approved the sign-in. You can return to the other device.
approve.errorBody: This sign-in request is invalid, already used, or expired.
approve.biometricReason: Verify it is you to approve this sign-in
approve.biometricFailedBody: Approve with your device biometrics or passcode to continue.
